name: magware-api
description: OpenAPI 3.1 specification for the Magware WMS REST API by Restore S.r.l.
author: Restore S.r.l. <info@re-store.it>

scripts.check: npm run lint:api && npm run lint:md && npm run format:check
scripts.build:site: node scripts/inject-changelog.mjs && mkdir -p _site && cp preview/magware.yaml _site/magware.yaml && cp site/index.html _site/index.html && cp site/CNAME _site/CNAME
